titleStmt.title: SII 8.369: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 369. (A.R. No. 88-A of 1903). ON THE SAME ROCK.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti samastabhuvanavikyāta pallavānvaya
śrīprithvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara
vīra mahēśvara pratyakṣacāṇakya namōghavākya
śrī matraiḷōkyamalla noḷaṁbapallavape¨rmaḍi jaya
siṁgadēvara pādapadmopajīvigaḷappa mādhyaṁdinaśākheya
bhāradvājagōtrada daṇḍanāyaka cāvuṇḍamayyagaḷge sa
kava¨rṣa 996-neyā Ānandasaṁvatsarada puṣya suddha 13
Ādityavāra muttarāyaṇa saṁkrāṁtiyandu śrīmannoḷaṁba
dēvar dhārāpū¨rvvakaṁ māḍi kōṭege nairityadiśāvarada kalku
ṭeyaṁ sa¨rvvābhyaṁtarasiddhiyāgi kuḍepaḍoḍe daṇḍanāyaka tamma
māḍisida viṣṇagrihakaṁ rāmēśvaradēva¨rggaṁ bhagavatīdēvīrakaṇḍasphuṭetasnānagandhadhūpa
dipanivēdyāṣṭā¨rcanakkamāgi koṭṭar . sāmānyōyaṁ tha¨rmmasētu ¨rnṛpāṇāṁ kālē kālē
pālanīyō bhavadbhiḥ . sa¨rvvānētānbhāginaḥ pā¨rthivēṁdrān bhūyō bhūyō yācatē
rāmacaṁdraḥ . madvaṁśajā paramahīpativaṁśajā vā . pāpādapētamanasā bhuvi
bhāvi lōkē . yē pālayaṁti mamadha¨rmamidaṁ samastaṁ tēnāṁjaliṁ praṇatimū¨rdhni kritēṣu nityaṁ .
svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasundharāṁ ṣaṣṭi¨rvya¨rṣasahaśrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē kṛmi . vaitta .
priyadiṁdintida neydakāva puruṣaṁ gāyuṣyamaṁ śrīyumakke yidaṁkāyade kāyva(vaṁ)pāpige
kurukṣētraṁgaḷōḷvāraṇā . siyoḷēṟkōṭe munīṁdraraṁ kavileyaṁ vēdāḍhyaraṁ koṁdoṁdu[¨r]yaśaṁ
miḍade sāṟudapavī śaiḷākṣarabhrājigaḷ . © śrīvīranoḷaṁbana padapāvanakamaḷa
natamahākara cāḷukya śrīvikrama pallavakulabhīma gadādaṇḍanenisidaṁcāvuṇḍaṁ . patihitavaina
tēyasannuta vṛttavudayana satījanagāṁgēya pratibaḷakāntēyaṁ satatabhujābaḷavikramakra
meyaśau¨ryyaṁ © śrīmatpōḷalamayya ranivāri mallōja kaṁḍarinidaṁ . ©The dates of this and of the following inscriptionante, Vol. I, p. 167.
Digital edition of SII 8.369 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
